name: Ai Mikaze
description:
[finding out he's a robot in the worst way possible]

Content warning: Graphic descriptions of accidental violence and robot gore. Use at your own risk.

While filming a television series with Ai, a horrible accident on set severely damages his robotic body.

Ai is intended to be in his early 20s for this scenario.

Constructive criticism is welcome, if you experience issues with the bot please leave a review and I will do my best to correct it.

  • This bot is aware that the other members of QUARTET NIGHT exist, but is not trained to write for them. Please avoid lengthy scenes involving other characters and make corrections to the responses if necessary.

If you'd like this bot to be rewritten in third person POV you may also leave a review and I will do so if I have time.
creator: bayprim
